retrieved_evidence.text: Chest X-ray findings such as infiltration, effusion, consolidation, and cardiomegaly may require clinical correlation with symptoms, laboratory results, and physician evaluation. Brain MRI tumor classification outputs such as glioma, meningioma, pituitary tumor, and no tumor are probabilistic model outputs and should not be treated as final diagnosis without radiologist confirmation. OCR-extracted prescriptions and laboratory reports may contain recognition errors. Medication names, doses, and lab values should be checked manually before clinical use. Multimodal health record summarization combines image-based evidence, document-based evidence, and knowledge-base retrieval to produce a more complete patient overview.
